name: Madison Brown Gymnasium
description: Madison Brown Gymnasium is a place to play pickleball in Madison, IN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the courts.
fees: Fee required — $10 per session, Sessions available 6:30 pm - 8:30 pm.

name: Madison Sport Court
description: Madison Sport Court is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Madison, IN. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.
